downstream_anchor_review.anchor_name: Salmon Falls  Lower Water Raft Take-out
downstream_anchor_review.interpretation: The corridor windows now extend along the adopted NHD directed mainstem axis to the official Salmon Falls take-out anchor at 49077.732 m. Source acquisition covers the full adopted axis; corridor cropping, editor binding, and solver-window promotion remain P3/P4 work with the bank-landing refinement batched to the P7 owner packet.

pending_human_review.note: The parking-centroid anchor is adopted for stationing; the exact riverbank landing refinement rides the P7 owner packet and does not block stationing or corridor binding.

superseded_source_mile_window.disposition: The 20.5-21.0 mile published-mile ambiguity window remains committed as discrepancy evidence; the release-1.0-plan section 6 adoption resolved the downstream anchor to the official Salmon Falls take-out access geometry.
